findings.message: Query path `list_items()` reads from database with no metric or span around it
findings.suggestion: Add metrics.record_query() or span instrumentation around session.scalars() call to track query latency and result count

findings.message: Write path `create_item()` persists to database with no metric or span around it
findings.suggestion: Add span instrumentation or explicit metrics tracking around session.add() and session.commit() to observe write latency and errors

findings.message: Write path `add_embedding()` persists embedding to database with no metric or span
findings.suggestion: Add metrics instrumentation around session.add() and session.commit() to track write operations

findings.message: Query path `nearest()` executes cosine distance search with no latency metric or span
findings.suggestion: Add metrics.record_query() or span around session.scalars() to track vector search latency and result count

findings.message: MongoDB write path `insert_document()` has no correlation ID in error logs
findings.suggestion: Wrap the insert_one() call in try/except and log errors with get_logger().error() which auto-injects correlation_id via structlog context

findings.message: MongoDB query path `find_documents()` has no correlation ID in error logs
findings.suggestion: Wrap the find() call in try/except and log errors with get_logger().error() which auto-injects correlation_id

findings.message: MongoDB client `get_client()` returns MongoClient with no health check endpoint
findings.suggestion: Consider adding a health() function that calls client.admin.command('ping') similar to the /health route pattern

findings.message: Cache write path `cache_set()` has no metric or span around it
findings.suggestion: Add metrics instrumentation around client.set() to track cache write operations

findings.message: Cache read path `cache_get()` has no metric or span around it
findings.suggestion: Add metrics instrumentation around client.get() to track cache read operations and hit/miss ratio

findings.message: Cache delete path `cache_delete()` has no metric or span around it
findings.suggestion: Add metrics instrumentation around client.delete() to track cache invalidations

findings.message: Redis client `get_redis()` returns client with no dedicated health check endpoint
findings.suggestion: Add a health() function that calls client.ping() and is accessible from the health route without creating a separate Redis connection each time

findings.message: Unbounded aggregation query `bucketed_averages()` executes time_bucket GROUP BY without latency metric or row count
findings.suggestion: Add metrics.record_query() around session.execute() to track aggregation latency and row count. Consider adding a LIMIT or monitoring row cardinality

findings.message: Graph write path `relate()` executes Cypher MERGE without metric or span
findings.suggestion: Add span instrumentation or metrics around session.execute() to track relationship creation latency and errors

findings.message: Graph query path `neighbors()` executes Cypher MATCH without metric or span
findings.suggestion: Add metrics instrumentation around session.execute() to track graph query latency and result cardinality
